title: Built with tokens
description: A real analytics dashboard styled entirely from FDS tokens — no utility classes, no copied component CSS.
intro: This is the home page's claim made concrete: a working dashboard whose every colour, spacing step, radius and shadow is an FDS token resolved through --fx-* custom properties. Type comes from FDS base typography. There is not one hand-picked hex or pixel gap.
proofBlurb: The dashboard's stylesheet is scanned at build time against the package registry — the same array of tokens the package exports. Every --fx-* reference is a real token; an off-system value would surface here as a failure, so this page cannot silently drift from the system.
